---
title: '2014/02/26 Journal Wed'
date: '2014-02-26T14:15:00.0010000+00:00'
draft: true
blogger_blog: '(My Journal) Fed By Faith'
blogger_status: 'LIVE'
blogger_post_id: '8260675261944901946'
blogger_filename: '/2014/02/20140226-journal-wed.html'
blogger_source: 'takeout-20260223T235336Z-3-001.zip:Takeout/Blogger/Blogs/(My Journal) Fed By Faith/feed.atom'
categories:
  - 'Journal'
---

<br />
<h4>
VOD:</h4>
<blockquote class="tr_bq">
<a href="https://www.bible.com/users/darrellwolfe/reading-plans/28-joseph-prince?initial=true&amp;user_id=darrellwolfe" rel="nofollow" target="_blank">Day 106</a><br />Taught By God Himself<br />Hebrews 8:11<br />11None of them shall teach his neighbor, and none his brother, saying, ‘Know the Lord,’ for all shall know Me, from the least of them to the greatest of them.</blockquote>
<br />
<h4>
Thankful:</h4>
I'm thankful that I woke up today!<br />
<br />
<h4>
Feeling:</h4>
Irritated by the kids arguing.<br />
<br />
Tired of looking for new jobs but CANNOT stay where I am. I've been going through wild swings of depression.<br />
<br />
<h4>
What's Up?</h4>
<br />
Going to doctor today for annual check up so I can get free money.<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<h4>
</h4>
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
